allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); routes=data.get\('paths',{}\); [print\(f'{k}: {list\(v.keys\(\)\)}'\) for k,v in routes.items\(\) if 'thread' in k]")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; import inspect; print\(inspect.getfile\(app\)\); print\([r for r in app.routes if 'thread' in str\(r.path\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; [print\(f'{r.methods} {r.path}'\) for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r,'path'\) and 'thread' in r.path]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); routes=data.get\('paths',{}\); [print\(f'{k}: {list\(v.keys\(\)\)}'\) for k,v in sorted\(routes.items\(\)\) if 'thread' in k]")
